param.name: pilot
param.comment: Pilot (optional, will be retrieved from ship if not provided)

param.name: forceGTContext
param.comment: Authoritative assignment/update path; don't treat transient state as non-GT

do_if.value: not $ship? or not $ship.exists or @$ship.iswreck or not @$ship.isoperational

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Install entry ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ', forceGTContext=' + $forceGTContext + ', default=' + $defaultOrderId + ', current=' + $currentOrderId + ', commanderOrder=' + $commanderOrderId
'[GT-Mods] Deferred install waiting for pilot binding on ' + $ship.idcode + ' (pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ')'

do_if.value: $pilot? and md.GT_Ship_Management.Register_Pilot? and (not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?)
$pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level? and GT_Reconcile_Ship_Modifications?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Install exit ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ', reconciled=' + $reconciled
'[GT-Mods] Deferred install waiting for pilot registry on ' + $ship.idcode + ' (pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ')'

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to install penalty modifications on

param.name: pilot
param.comment: Pilot (optional, will be retrieved from ship if not provided)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Penalty] Removed penalty mods from ' + $ship.idcode + ' (modifications feature disabled)'
'[GT-Penalty] ── Penalty check for ' + $ship.idcode + ': class=' + $shipClass + ', pilotLevel=' + $pilotLevel + ', penaltyLevel=' + $penaltyLevel + ' ──'

'[GT-Penalty] Migrated old penalty mod data for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + $oldModName + ' ship: ' + (if $shipModName? then $shipModName else 'UNKNOWN') + ', engine: ' + (if $engineModName? then $engineModName else 'UNKNOWN') + ')'
'[GT-Penalty] Removed invalid/unrecognized old penalty mod data for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + $oldModName + ' - likely import failure)'

do_if.value: ($existingPenaltyShipMod? and $existingPenaltyShipMod != null and ($existingPenaltyShipMod != $penaltyShipModWare or not $penaltyShipModWare?)) or ($existingPenaltyEngineMod? and $existingPenaltyEngineMod != null and ($existingPenaltyEngineMod != $penaltyEngineModWare or not $penaltyEngineModWare?))

debug_text.text: '[GT-Penalty] Removing old penalty mods from ' + $ship.idcode + ' (ship: ' + (if $existingShipModName? then $existingShipModName else 'none') + ', engine: ' + (if $existingEngineModName? then $existingEngineModName else 'none') + ')'
'[GT-Penalty] Installing ' + $penaltyName + ' penalty mods on ' + $ship.idcode + ' (Pilot Level: ' + $pilotLevel + ', Ship Size: ' + $shipClass + ')'

'[GT-Penalty] Successfully installed penalty mods on ' + $ship.idcode + ' (ship: ' + (if $penaltyShipModWare != null then @$penaltyShipModWare.name else 'none') + ', engine: ' + (if $penaltyEngineModWare != null then @$penaltyEngineModWare.name else 'none') + ')'
'[GT-Penalty] No penalty required for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (Pilot Level: ' + $pilotLevel + ', Ship Size: ' + $shipClass + ')'

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to remove penalty modifications from

debug_text.text: '[GT-Penalty] Removing penalty mods from ' + $ship.idcode + ' (ship: ' + (if $shipModName? then $shipModName else 'none') + ', engine: ' + (if $engineModName? then $engineModName else 'none') + ', explicit removal call)'
'[GT-Penalty] Skipping penalty mod removal for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - not GT-installed (player mod may be present)'
'[GT-Penalty] No penalty mod found on ' + $ship.idcode + ' to remove (explicit removal call)'

do_if.value: $wareId? and ($wareId == 'mod_ship_gt_level1' or $wareId == 'mod_ship_gt_level2' or $wareId == 'mod_ship_gt_level3' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_ship_light' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_ship_moderate' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_ship_severe' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_light' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_moderate' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_severe')

$wareId? and ($wareId == 'mod_engine_gt_level1' or $wareId == 'mod_engine_gt_level2' or $wareId == 'mod_engine_gt_level3' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_engine_light' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_engine_moderate' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_engine_severe' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_light' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_moderate' or $wareId == 'mod_penalty_severe')

param.name: modificationsEnabledOverride
param.comment: Optional override for global toggle (e.g. from settings-changed signal)

param.name: forceGTContext
param.comment: Compatibility parameter; active GT callers are authoritative and do not re-check GT context here

param.name: removeGTModsOnly
param.comment: Force GT-managed mod removal without relying on settings override semantics

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Reconcile entry ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + (if $pilot? then $pilot.name else 'NONE') + ', override=' + (if $modificationsEnabledOverride != null then $modificationsEnabledOverride else 'NULL') + ', removeOnly=' + $removeGTModsOnly + ', forceGTContext=' + $forceGTContext + ', globalEnabled=' + $globalModificationsEnabled + ', effectiveEnabled=' + $modificationsEnabled + ', source=' + $modificationsEnabledSource + ', default=' + $defaultOrderId + ', current=' + $currentOrderId + ', commander=' + $commanderId + ', commanderOrder=' + $commanderOrderId + ', trackedSlots=' + $trackedSlotsCount

do_if.value: $modificationsEnabled and $pilot? and md.GT_Ship_Management.Register_Pilot? and (not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?)
$pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?
$modificationsEnabled and (not $pilot? or not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Reconcile deferred for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - GT pilot registry not ready (pilot=' + (if $pilot? then $pilot.name else 'NONE') + ', source=' + $modificationsEnabledSource + ', effectiveEnabled=' + $modificationsEnabled + ')'

'[GT-Mods] Reconcile state ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilotLevel=' + $pilotLevel + ', class=' + $shipClass + ', desiredPenalty=' + $desiredPenaltyLevel + ', desiredBonus=' + $desiredBonusLevel + ', desiredShip=' + (if $desiredShipWare? then $desiredShipWare else 'NONE') + ', desiredEngine=' + (if $desiredEngineWare? then $desiredEngineWare else 'NONE') + ', hasAnyShip=' + $hasAnyShipMod + ', hasAnyEngine=' + $hasAnyEngineMod + ', currentShip=' + (if $currentShipMod? then $currentShipMod else 'NONE') + ', currentEngine=' + (if $currentEngineMod? then $currentEngineMod else 'NONE') + ', currentShipIsGT=' + $currentShipIsGT + ', currentEngineIsGT=' + $currentEngineIsGT + ', currentShipIsNonGT=' + $currentShipIsNonGT + ', currentEngineIsNonGT=' + $currentEngineIsNonGT + ', unresolvedShip=' + $unresolvedShipMod + ', unresolvedEngine=' + $unresolvedEngineMod + ', trackedShip=' + $trackedHasShipSlot + ', trackedEngine=' + $trackedHasEngineSlot

'[GT-Mods] Reconcile-disable reason ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', source=' + $modificationsEnabledSource + ', override=' + (if $modificationsEnabledOverride != null then $modificationsEnabledOverride else 'NULL') + ', removeOnly=' + $removeGTModsOnly + ', globalEnabled=' + $globalModificationsEnabled + ', effectiveEnabled=' + $modificationsEnabled + ', trackedShip=' + $trackedHasShipSlot + ', trackedEngine=' + $trackedHasEngineSlot + ', currentShipIsGT=' + $currentShipIsGT + ', currentEngineIsGT=' + $currentEngineIsGT + ', unresolvedShip=' + $unresolvedShipMod + ', unresolvedEngine=' + $unresolvedEngineMod
'[GT-Mods] Reconcile-disable ' + $ship.idcode + ': removed GT-managed mods only (vanilla mods untouched)'

do_if.value: $desiredShipWareId != null and not $currentShipIsNonGT and ((not $hasAnyShipMod) or ($currentShipIsGT and $currentShipModId != $desiredShipWareId))
$desiredEngineWareId != null and not $currentEngineIsNonGT and ((not $hasAnyEngineMod) or ($currentEngineIsGT and $currentEngineModId != $desiredEngineWareId))

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Reconcile apply ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', desiredShipId=' + (if $desiredShipWareId? then $desiredShipWareId else 'NONE') + ', desiredEngineId=' + (if $desiredEngineWareId? then $desiredEngineWareId else 'NONE') + ', manageShip=' + $shipSlotManagedByGT + ', manageEngine=' + $engineSlotManagedByGT

'[GT-Mods] Reconcile ' + $ship.idcode + ': enabled=' + $modificationsEnabled + ', pilot=' + $pilotLevel + ', class=' + $shipClass + ', desiredPenalty=' + $desiredPenaltyLevel + ', desiredBonus=' + $desiredBonusLevel + ', finalShip=' + @global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$GTModifications.$GTInstalledSlots.count

param.name: modificationsEnabledOverride
param.comment: Optional override for global $Modifications.$Enabled (e.g. from settings-changed signal)

param.name: ship
param.comment: Player-owned ship to validate after load

do_if.value: not $ship? or not $ship.exists or not $ship.isplayerowned or @$ship.iswreck or not @$ship.isoperational

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Load cleanup scan: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', default=' + (if $ship.defaultorder? then @$ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', current=' + (if $ship.order? then @$ship.order.id else 'NONE') + ', identifiedGTMods=' + $identifiedGTMods + ', trackedNeedsCleanup=' + $trackedNeedsCleanup + ', shouldCleanup=' + $gtStatus.$ShouldCleanup

'[GT-Penalty] Migration: Migrated old penalty mod for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + $oldModName + ' ship: ' + (if $shipModName? then $shipModName else 'UNKNOWN') + ', engine: ' + (if $engineModName? then $engineModName else 'UNKNOWN') + ')'
'[GT-Penalty] Migration: Removed invalid/unrecognized old penalty mod for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (old: ' + $oldModName + ' - likely import failure)'
'[GT-Penalty] Migration: Migrated ' + $migrationCount + ' old penalty mod entries to new structure'
'[GT-Mods] Mod removal Lua module is provided via ui.xml'
'[GT-Mods] Load cleanup completed: scanned=' + (if $playerShips.count? then $playerShips.count else 0) + ', cleaned=' + $cleanedCount

do_if.value: $enabledOverride == null and global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Modifications.$Enabled?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] Deferred refresh skipped: missing ship in payload (source=' + $source + ', attempt=' + $attempt + ')'

'[GT-Mods] Deferred refresh entry ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', source=' + $source + ', attempt=' + $attempt + ', forceGTContext=' + $forceGTContext + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ', default=' + $defaultOrderId + ', current=' + $currentOrderId + ', commanderOrder=' + $commanderOrderId
'[GT-Mods] Deferred refresh processed for ' + $ship.idcode + ' source=' + $source + ' attempt=' + $attempt + ' complete=' + $refreshComplete

check_value.value: global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and event.param? and event.param.id? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@event.param.id}

debug_text.text: '[GT-Mods] GT order assigned - installing modifications for ship: ' + $ship.idcode
'[GT-Mods] Commander set to GT commander - installing subordinate modifications for: ' + $ship.idcode
'[GT-Mods] Installing modifications for ship: ' + $ship.idcode + ' (from state update - GT order assigned)'
'[GT-Mods] Installing modifications for subordinate: ' + $ship.idcode + ' (commander has GT order)'
'[GT-Mods] Remove cue entry ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', updateType=' + (if $updateType then $updateType else 'NULL') + ', shouldProcess=' + $shouldProcess
'[GT-Mods] Remove cue executing disable reconcile for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (direct=' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', viaCommander=' + $hasGTCommander + ', updateType=' + $updateType + ')'
'[GT-Mods] Clearing home refresh marker (home=' + @$hs.knownname + ', initiator=' + $ship.idcode + ' lost GT order)'
'[GT-Mods] SAFEGUARD: Skipping mod removal for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - ship still GT-controlled (direct=' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', viaCommander=' + $hasGTCommander + ')'
'[GT-Mods] SAFEGUARD: Skipping backup removal for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - ship still GT-controlled (direct=' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', viaCommander=' + $hasGTCommander + ', reason=' + $reason + ')'

'[GT-Mods] Backup removal executing disable reconcile for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (reason=' + (if $reason? and $reason != '' then $reason else 'UNSPECIFIED') + ', direct=' + $hasDirectGTOrder + ', viaCommander=' + $hasGTCommander + ')'
